note: Expected-artifacts registry. Every item traces to an external authority, not our opinion. Weights sum to 100. Seed from themis-atlas-rubric-v1.md.

artifacts.name: Generative AI Use Policy

authority.name: Cal. Rule of Court 10.430
authority.citation: Courts not prohibiting GenAI must adopt a use policy; effective 2025-09-01, deadline 2025-12-15.

artifacts.canShow: whether a compliant policy is published and how complete it is

authority.name: Cal. Standard of Judicial Administration 10.80
authority.citation: Standard (guideline) for judicial officers' GenAI use.

artifacts.name: Records management / retention

authority.name: Gov. Code 68150 + Trial Court Records Manual

artifacts.canShow: a published retention schedule or records policy

artifacts.name: Data security & privacy posture
artifacts.canShow: a published privacy policy or security posture (often not public)

artifacts.name: Public access to judicial administrative records

authority.name: Cal. Rule of Court 10.500
authority.citation: Public access to judicial administrative records.

artifacts.canShow: whether a Rule 10.500 access process is published

authority.name: Judicial Council planning
authority.citation: Multi-year strategic plan signals planning maturity.

authority.name: Judicial Council technology planning (ITAC)
authority.citation: Court/branch tech plan signals modernization capacity.

authority.name: CA Strategic Plan for Language Access
authority.citation: Language access is required public-service readiness.

artifacts.name: AI governance framework alignment
artifacts.canShow: a public reference to a recognized AI framework
